name: workflow-node-upstream-reference-study
title: 熟悉工作流拖拽画布上游节点引用填充机制
description: 梳理拖拽式工作流页面中节点之间的数据互通机制，重点确认下游节点如何选择、保存、校验并在执行时解析上游节点输出引用。
creator: zj669
notes: Implemented follow-up UX/contract fixes. Ordinary input fields now use all ancestor node outputSchema entries, not only direct incoming nodes, so TOOL/HTTP can reference LLM outputs across multi-hop chains. Reference input now supports typing {{ to open an autocomplete popover and stores the selected sourceRef as the standard raw reference. Config text/textarea fields such as HTTP URL/headers/body also support {{ autocomplete against upstream variables. LLM nodes now have text/json output modes; JSON mode instructs the model to return JSON, parses the response server-side into json_output, and exposes top-level JSON fields in node outputs. HTTP executor now reads current frontend config keys http_url/http_method/http_headers/http_body, resolves direct node-output templates through PromptTemplateResolver, and emits http_response to match the frontend system output schema. Latest frontend cleanup removes the global input concept from Prompt defaults and autocomplete; new LLM prompts default to {{start.output.inputMessage}}, and all reference popovers only group ancestor node outputs. Autocomplete popovers now accept Tab to apply the first matched candidate; Enter still works where it already made sense. LLM input tab no longer renders the advanced inputSchema mapping panel; it now keeps only the Prompt template editor. LLM output schema now exposes only the active mode primary field in the editor: text mode shows response, JSON mode shows json_output; backend legacy aliases llm_output/text remain runtime compatibility outputs only. LLM config tab no longer renders the contextRefNodes reference-node selector, WorkflowNode no longer computes that candidate list, and save normalization removes historical contextRefNodes instead of auto-filling them. Tool node dropdown now deduplicates MCP tools by displayed serverName/toolName while preserving the selected fullName when reopening historical configs. Verified with npm run typecheck, targeted workflow Vitest suite, targeted NodeConfigTabs Vitest coverage, targeted ESLint, and mvn -pl ai-agent-infrastructure -am -DskipTests compile.
